summary: Implemented Issue #728 PC terminal 1-3 horizontal split with per-split CLI selection + MessageInput via strict Red-Green TDD. Added 4 new modules (terminal-split-config, useTerminalSplits hook, TerminalSplitPane, TerminalSplitContainer) plus draft-key migration in MessageInput, with 60 new unit tests (+59 vs baseline 6628). Wired TerminalSplitContainer into the PC branch of WorktreeDetailRefactored, replacing terminalHeaderMemo and the shared bottom MessageInput / NavigationButtons / PromptPanel; mobile path untouched. Used a compat shim: splitIndex=0 reads from state.terminal.* (so existing cli-tab-switching stale-fetch tests still pass, redesigned to drive activeCliTab via the per-split CLI selector); per-split polling fan-out for splitIndex>=1 is deferred to the refactor phase (R3-005). All four quality gates green: lint 0, tsc 0, 6687 tests pass, build success.

tests_written.purpose: isValidSplitConfig validation invariants (range, widths, cli tool ids)
Hook initialization, persistence, addSplit/removeSplit boundaries, availableCliTools, focused index clamping, 1->2->3->2->1 preservation, stale-state fallback
Region role, CLI selector disabled options, search dispatch, onFocus bubbling, attach skeleton, headerExtras slot
group role, add/remove button enabling at MIN/MAX, resizer rendering, availableCliTools propagation, focus-on-add, onFocusedSplitChange
splitIndex draft key scoping, legacy migration (with/without existing new key), splitIndex!=0 skips migration, onFocus prop
Negative test: no terminalSplits action/state in reducer (S3-006)

design_decisions_taken.decision: useTerminalSplits is an independent hook, NOT added to useWorktreeUIState reducer or LayoutState
design_decisions_taken.rationale: S3-006: keep reducer scoped to VS Code layout (activityBar/historyPane/leftPaneTab) and avoid action explosion

design_decisions_taken.decision: Same (worktreeId, cliToolId) across splits is forbidden
design_decisions_taken.rationale: S1-002: lets Auto-Yes / response-poller / tmux session keys stay 2-tuple. CLI selector disables already-taken options. setSplitCliTool is a no-op on collision
Issue requirement; back-compat via legacy migration on splitIndex=0 mount
Worktree-scoped to keep one worktree's split config independent of others

design_decisions_taken.decision: Compat shim: splitIndex=0 reads from state.terminal.*; splitIndex>=1 renders empty terminal for now
design_decisions_taken.rationale: Avoids deep refactor of fetchCurrentOutput / fetchMessages polling pipeline. Keeps the existing CLI tab switching test working (redesigned to use the per-split CLI selector at splitIndex=0). Per-split polling fan-out is deferred to the refactor phase (R3-005); the structural placeholder (per-split TerminalDisplay, MessageInput, NavigationButtons, PromptPanel) is in place

design_decisions_taken.decision: FilePanelSplit signature unchanged (S3-003); terminalHeader=null on PC
design_decisions_taken.rationale: CLI selector + search button moved into each TerminalSplitPane header
HISTORY_PANE_ID uniqueness must be preserved (Issue #730 contract). HistoryPane stays inside TerminalContainer, one level up

design_decisions_taken.decision: HistoryPane onInsertToMessage routes through focusedSplitIndex via pendingInsertTextMap (Map<splitIndex, string|null>)
design_decisions_taken.rationale: S3-004 — insertion lands in the most-recently-focused split; default index 0

design_decisions_taken.decision: TerminalSplitContainer wraps PaneResizer in a capture-listening div to mark isResizing=true on mousedown/touchstart
design_decisions_taken.rationale: Add/remove buttons get disabled while a resizer is active per acceptance criteria

quality_gates.test_unit: pass (6687/6694, 7 skipped, baseline was 6628 → +59 new tests)

deviations_from_plan: Per-split polling fan-out (state.terminal.* per-split) NOT done; replaced with compat shim where splitIndex=0 reads from existing reducer state. This is documented as follow-up R3-005 (refactor phase). Functional requirement of 'each split has independent MessageInput/NavigationButtons/PromptPanel/CLI selector' IS met today.

Mobile path of WorktreeDetailRefactored kept literally unchanged (no useTerminalSplits invocation); the mobile MessageInput now reads pendingInsertTextMap.get(0) via a thin handleInsertConsumedSingle wrapper.

Task 4.1 'new-split attach UX' has a skeleton hook (attaching prop on TerminalSplitPane) but is not wired to a real tmux-attach detection; the wiring is deferred to follow-up because attach detection requires per-split fetch which is also deferred.
Did not write the Phase 5.7 Playwright e2e — explicitly Should-Have / optional in the work plan.
Did not update CLAUDE.md / CHANGELOG.md (Phase 6) — left for the PM/refactor phase as is convention for #728 series.
follow_ups_for_refactor_phase: R3-005: fan out fetchCurrentOutput / fetchMessages into per-split polling (replace compat shim that keeps splitIndex>=1 empty). Each TerminalSplitPane should own a polling effect keyed on (worktreeId, cliToolId).
R3-006: wire real attach-completion detection to TerminalSplitPane.attaching (currently always false).
R3-007: TerminalSplitContainer + WorktreeDetailRefactored: replace remaining state.terminal.* slice references with per-split state once Mobile is also migrated.
R3-008: Add Playwright e2e (split add/remove + cross-worktree persistence + PaneResizer cursor cleanup with 5 instances). Manual smoke is enough for this iteration.
R3-009: CLAUDE.md + CHANGELOG.md update once the Phase 6 docs are written.
R3-010: existing CLI tab switching test was redesigned; if Phase 5.5 polling fan-out lands, the test will need a second look (it currently exercises only splitIndex=0 via the per-split selector).
